commands.name: about
output: Hi, I'm a developer. I build things for the web and beyond.
I enjoy creating functional, raw, and highly intentional interfaces.
This terminal is a reflection of how I work: keyboard-first,
low latency, no fluff. If you're reading this, you know what I mean.

commands.name: projects
output: [1] project-alpha   : A distributed messaging system built in Rust.
Status: active | Stars: 842
[2] react-terminal  : This website! Built with HTML, CSS, JS.
Status: active | Stars: 314
[3] data-viz-engine : A dashboard for visualizing complex datasets.
Status: archived | Stars: 207
[4] cli-toolkit     : A collection of shell utilities for devs.
Status: active | Stars: 91

commands.name: whoami
output: guest

commands.name: ls
output: drwxr-xr-x  projects/
drwxr-xr-x  scripts/
-rw-r--r--  README.md
-rw-r--r--  package.json

commands.name: cat README.md
output: # hello, world
This terminal is my digital home.
Built with pure HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
Type 'help' to see what you can do here.
Type 'about' to learn about me.
Type 'projects' to see what I've built.
-- guest
